title: Live updates: Two Indian ships come under fire in Strait of Hormuz after Iran reasserts control
snippet: Iran reimposes 'strict control' over Strait of Hormuz. Two Indian-flagged ships targeted by gunfire. VLCC Sanmar Herald fired upon by two Iranian gunboats despite prior clearance. India summoned Iran's ambassador. US blockade now intercepted 23 vessels total. At least 3 attacks on commercial ships Saturday.
tag_reason: Detailed reporting on IRGC attacks on Indian ships and India's diplomatic response — new April 18 events
